svg.title: Gorakh — Payments & Platform Engineer

g.text: I design the system, lead the team,

svg.text: >_ 12+ years: PHP dev → team lead → engineering manager & architect.
🏗️ Payment rails, KYC automation, microservices, cloud-native AWS.
🤖 Lately: agentic AI platforms, RAG & LLM evaluation frameworks.
“Merged is not deployed.” — every incident ever
